title: Construction Atlas UI Catalog
description: Graph navigation interface for construction details, assemblies, conditions, and artifacts. Read-only visualization.
ui_framework: Next.js 14 + React 18 + Tailwind CSS + React Flow + Zustand

routes.purpose: Detail graph explorer with SVG preview, variants, installation sequence, artifact downloads
Assembly graph explorer with component lists
Condition graph explorer with severity, status, and detail resolution links
Artifact explorer with lineage, content hash, download, and source detail navigation

components.purpose: React Flow graph canvas with custom node rendering, minimap, and controls
Left sidebar: search, type filters, route navigation, node list
Full detail view: SVG preview, variants, installation sequence, artifact downloads
Artifact detail view: lineage, content hash, source detail link, download
Right panel: node properties, type-specific displays (severity, components, findings)
Right panel: connected nodes with edge labels and navigation

governance_rules: Atlas UI is read-only — no mutations to kernel or runtime data
All data sourced from Construction_Runtime reference graph
Node types match reference graph node taxonomy
Artifact lineage displayed but never modified
